feed.title: jpcite public discovery feed
feed.subtitle: Public pages and API documents for jpcite, a source-linked evidence API for Japanese public programs, laws, cases, and company research.
feed.rights: (C) 2026 Bookyou株式会社. Public-source records keep their original source licenses and attribution.

entry.title: LLM crawler discovery surfaces
entry.summary: Canonical crawler and managed-agent discovery links for jpcite.
entry.content: Lists llms.txt, llms-full, robots, sitemap, OpenAPI, MCP, and well-known discovery surfaces for jpcite crawlers and managed agents.

entry.title: jpcite API docs
entry.summary: Overview, quickstart, MCP setup, and REST API guidance.
entry.content: Public documentation for using jpcite as a source-linked evidence API.

entry.title: Agent-safe OpenAPI document
entry.summary: OpenAPI document intended for LLM tools and agent actions.
entry.content: Machine-readable API document for evidence, search, and public-record lookup endpoints.

entry.title: MCP tools guide
entry.summary: Local MCP setup for Claude Desktop, Cursor, and compatible clients.
entry.content: Install and configuration notes for using jpcite through MCP clients.

entry.title: Evidence prefetch guide
entry.summary: How agents should use jpcite before answer generation.
entry.content: Explains source URLs, fetched-at metadata, known gaps, and citation-preserving answers.

entry.title: Data sources and licenses
entry.summary: Public source and license overview for jpcite datasets.
entry.content: Lists public source families and attribution notes for records served by jpcite.

entry.title: Pricing
entry.summary: Public pricing and anonymous usage limits.
entry.content: Metered API pricing, cost preview guidance, and anonymous usage notes.
